zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Wardlaw於大約1400年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾維爾頓時，他的父親Andrew Wardlaw36歲，母親Christian de Valognes31歲。他於大約1418年與Christian Lauder在蘇格蘭費伏結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1440年4月6日在蘇格蘭享年41歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏聖 安德魯斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Wardlaw于大约1400年出生在苏格兰洛包爾維爾頓时，他的父亲Andrew Wardlaw36岁，母亲Christian de Valognes31岁。他于大约1418年与Christian Lauder在苏格兰費伏结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1440年4月6日在苏格兰享年41岁，埋葬在苏格兰費伏聖 安德魯斯。

nameMeanings.name: Wardlaw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: probably a habitational name from Wardlaw, in Kirkhill, Inverness, which is recorded as Wardelaue in 1202, or perhaps Wardlaw in Ayrs. However, the possibility that the Scottish family is related to the Wardlow family of Wardlow (Derbys) cannot be ruled out. The placenames derive from Old English weard ‘watch’ + hlāw ‘mound, hill’.

variants.name: Wardlow
meanings: English: habitational name from Wardlow in Derbyshire, from Old English weard ‘watch’ + hlāw ‘hill’. Compare Wardlaw .

variants.name: Warden
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Anglo-Norman French wardein, Old French gardein ‘one who keeps guard, a warden’, i.e. a gate-keeper, porter, or sentinel.

English: habitational name from any of various places, for example in Bedfordshire, County Durham, Kent, Northumerland, and Northamptonshire, called Warden, from Old English weard ‘watch’ + dūn ‘hill’. Compare Wardlaw and Wardle 2.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Wardlaw was born about 1400, in Wilton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, his father, Andrew Wardlaw, was 36 and his mother, Christian de Valognes, was 31. He married Christian Lauder about 1418, in Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 6 April 1440, in Scotland, at the age of 41, and was buried in St Andrews, Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Wardlaw est né environ 1400, à Wilton, Roxburghshire, Écosse, son père, Andrew Wardlaw, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Christian de Valognes, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Christian Lauder environ 1418, à Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 avril 1440, à Écosse, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à St Andrews, Fife, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Wardlaw um 1400 in Wilton, Roxburghshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Andrew Wardlaw 36 und seine Mutter Christian de Valognes 31. Er hat um 1418 in Fife, Scotland Christian Lauder geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. April 1440 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in St Andrews, Fife, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Wardlaw è nato il circa 1400 nel Wilton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Andrew Wardlaw, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Christian de Valognes, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Christian Lauder circa 1418, nel Fife, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 aprile 1440, nel Scotland, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a St Andrews, Fife, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Wardlawが約1400年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアウィルトンで生まれた時，父Andrew Wardlawは36歳，母Christian de Valognesは31歳であった。約1418年にスコットランドフィフでChristian Lauderと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1440年4月6日にスコットランドで41歳で死去し，スコットランドフィフスト アンドリュースにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Wardlaw(이)가 대략 1400년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 윌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andrew Wardlaw(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian de Valognes(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1418년 스컷랜드 피프에서 Christian Lauder(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1440년 4월 6일 스컷랜드에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프 스트 앤드루스에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Christian Lauder aproximadamente 1418, em Fife, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Wardlaw родился около 1400 г. в местности уилтон, роксбургшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Andrew Wardlaw было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian de Valognes, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Christian Lauder около 1418 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 апреля 1440 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности ст андрюс, фиф, Шотландия.
